title: quinquina × mixtissima
intro: Quinquina × mixtissima, also known as Cinchona × ledgeriana, is a hybrid plant species of the Cinchona genus, native to the Andean region. It is a valuable source of quinine, a natural compound with medicinal properties, particularly in treating malaria and other fever-related conditions. The health benefits of Quinquina × mixtissima include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with malaria. The plant's quinine content is often used in herbal preparations, such as tea infusions and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
